MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Louisa Troche.
Attorney Francisco Torres for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lavette Tookas is present.
Attorney Sheldon Balman appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May 16, 2016 remains on calendar.
